views.name: DashboardView
views.purpose: Active shopping list grouped by category with progress ring showing completion %, budget bar, and quick-add FAB. Shows unchecked items prominently with swipe-to-check-off, purchased items collapsed at bottom with strikethrough.

views.name: EntrySheet
views.purpose: Quick add item with smart category auto-suggestion, quantity stepper, unit picker, estimated price, and priority. Shows frequently-added items as quick-tap chips at top for instant re-add.

views.name: HistoryView
views.purpose: Past shopping trips grouped by date, each showing total items, total spent, and completion rate. Tap a trip to see all items. Filter by category or date range. Calendar heatmap showing shopping frequency.

views.name: AnalyticsView
views.purpose: Spending trends (weekly/monthly bar chart), category pie chart breakdown, most-purchased items leaderboard, budget adherence streak, average trip cost trend line, and smart insights like 'You spend 35% on produce — up 10% this month'.

viewModelComputedProperties.name: activeItems
viewModelComputedProperties.description: All items not yet purchased (isPurchased == false), sorted by priority (essential first) then category

viewModelComputedProperties.name: purchasedItems
viewModelComputedProperties.description: All checked-off items for the current list (today's date), sorted by purchase time

viewModelComputedProperties.name: completionPercentage
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Percentage of today's items that are purchased: purchasedItems.count / totalItems.count * 100

viewModelComputedProperties.name: estimatedTotal
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Sum of (estimatedPrice * quantity) for all active + purchased items in current list

viewModelComputedProperties.name: purchasedTotal
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Sum of (estimatedPrice * quantity) for purchased items only — actual spend so far

viewModelComputedProperties.name: itemsByCategory
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Active items grouped by GroceryCategory for aisle-organized display

viewModelComputedProperties.name: weeklySpendingData
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Total estimated spend per day for the last 7 days, used for bar chart

viewModelComputedProperties.name: monthlySpendingData
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Total spend per week for the last 4 weeks, used for trend line chart

viewModelComputedProperties.name: categorySpendingBreakdown
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Spend per category as absolute and percentage of total, sorted descending

viewModelComputedProperties.name: mostFrequentItems
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Top 10 most frequently added item names across all history, for quick-add suggestions

viewModelComputedProperties.name: budgetStreak
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Consecutive shopping trips where total spend stayed under weeklyBudgetGoal / number of trips that week

viewModelComputedProperties.name: averageTripCost
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Mean of total spend across all historical shopping trips (unique dates with entries)

viewModelComputedProperties.name: spendingTrendDirection
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Compare this week's total to last week's: returns 'up X%', 'down X%', or 'stable'

viewModelComputedProperties.name: smartInsights
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Array of generated insight strings: top category change, budget status, shopping frequency pattern, most expensive recurring item

dailyGoal.description: Weekly grocery budget target. Each shopping trip's total is tracked against budget ÷ expected trips per week. Default assumes ~2 trips/week.

domainLogic.streakDefinition: A streak day is any day the user completes a shopping trip (checks off all essential-priority items). Budget streak counts consecutive trips where purchasedTotal ≤ weeklyBudget / estimatedTripsPerWeek.
domainLogic.trendAnalysis: Track weekly total spend vs 4-week rolling average. Category distribution shifts (e.g., produce % increasing). Shopping frequency (trips per week). Average items per trip. Price-per-item trend for frequently bought items.
insights: Budget adherence: 'You're $X under/over budget this week' with percentage comparison to last week
Category shift: 'Produce spending up 15% this month — your highest category at 32%'
Shopping frequency: 'You shop 2.3x per week on average — most on Saturdays'
Top item alert: 'You buy milk every trip — consider bulk pricing'
Completion rate: 'You check off 87% of items on average — 12 items typically left unpurchased'
Smart suggestion: 'Based on your history, you usually buy eggs, bread, and bananas — add them?'
Seasonal pattern: 'Your spending peaks in December — $45 above yearly average'
